info.anubanDaviSezaH: 1.934 janIjFzknasuraYjo'mantASca iti gaRasUtreRa asya DAtoH amantatvAt tasya nityaM mittve prApte  1.936 glAsnAvanuvamAM ca iti gaRasUtreRa upasargasya anupasTitO tad vikalpyate
info.english_meaning: to vomitto dropto emitto give outto be sick
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: micca  ' udgiraRe = vamane ' iti kASakftsnaH  ' udgiraRam = antargatasya muKena niHsAraRam ' iti mADavaH  ' Buktasya UrDvagatiH ' iti kzIrasvAmI  ' udit iti kASakftsnapAWaH ' iti taraNgiRyAm  ' prakfta kASakftsnaDAtupAWe tu ' qu vama ' ityeva dfSyate  ' kASyapAdInAmapyuditpAWaH ' iti mA.DA.vfttiH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'SoRitaM nirvamanti sma' (BA0 droRa0 9338) niratiSaye atiSayitaM ruDiraM vamanti smetyarTaH
'guRA anuktA api te svayaM yAnti prakASatAm CAdyamAnApi sOganDyamudvamatyeva mAlatI' (tantrA0 217).. udvamati nizWIvyati udgirati parimalamityAha
'karkowo vizaM tIkzRaM muKAtsatatamudvaman' (BA0 vana0 7230) samAvudvAntanirmadO (amaraH) hastinamuddiSya vacanam nirmado gaja udvAnta ucyata ityarTaH
